title: Academic Topper – 3rd Rank in B.E. IT (Second Year)
organization: Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering for Women, Pune
description: Secured 3rd Rank in the Second Year of Bachelor of Engineering (Information Technology) through consistent academic excellence and outstanding performance throughout the academic year.

title: 2nd Position – WebFusion
description: Achieved 2nd Position in the WebFusion competition by designing and developing an innovative, responsive and user-friendly web application while competing against multiple teams.

title: 11th Rank – Vortexa 2.0 Hackathon
description: Secured 11th Rank in the Vortexa 2.0 Hackathon by collaborating in a team to build an innovative software solution within a limited time, demonstrating strong problem-solving and development skills.

title: Best Project Team Award
description: Received the Best Project Team Award during the Java Full Stack Internship for successfully designing and developing the Hostel Management System with excellent teamwork and project execution.

title: Outstanding Girl Award
description: Honored with the Outstanding Girl Award for exceptional dedication, discipline, consistent performance and active participation throughout the internship program.
